Description: The 1N4148W is a high-speed switching diode fabricated in planar technology and encapsulated in a small Surface Mount Device (SMD) package (typically SOD-123). It is designed for general-purpose switching applications, high-speed rectification, and signal processing. It is characterized by its very fast recovery time, low capacitance, and high reliability.

Functions.FunctionDescription: Negative terminal (indicated by the band on the body)
